title: Create "doc" from api

posts.author: Alex99 (Alex)
posts.cookedHtml:
Can’t find a way how can I create a ‘doc’ type via GraphQL query for column type

{
   "id": "monday_doc",
   "title": "monday Doc",
   "description": null,
   "type": "doc",
   "settings_str": "{}"
}

Does it need to be created as a board or as a doc? What type of mutation to choose to create a complete doc for column with file and text?

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @Alex99 and welcome to the community!

I hope you like it here

As of today, there is no mutation for creating a monday doc via API.

I will add your vote for this feature

Cheers,
Matias

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml: Request monday.com: Where Teams Get Work Done
